title: Implement incremental region room rebuild and navigation versions
summary: Implement local Region/Room invalidation and rebuild, navigation versioning, and room consistency checks for terrain, walls, doors and occupancy-affecting changes.
acceptance: Wall, door and terrain changes mark affected chunks or regions without synchronous full-map rebuilds
Region graph and room ids expose monotonic navigation versions consumed by pathing
Tests cover local wall removal, door toggles, cross-boundary movement and room consistency
Dirty rebuild benchmark records queue length, processed cells and no sustained growth

history.details: Implemented incremental region/room rebuild, topology lanes, navigation versions, focused tests and region-room benchmark; required checks and lint pass

changes_requested: High: pnpm test --filter map-grid fails in touched packages/sim-core/src/map-grid.test.ts:67 because the expected MapCellView omits newly added wallMask/doorMask fields. Required WM-0021 checks otherwise pass, but this adjacent sim-core regression blocks verification.
Addressed reviewer map-grid regression; required and adjacent checks pass

review.summary: High: pnpm test --filter map-grid fails in touched packages/sim-core/src/map-grid.test.ts:67 because the expected MapCellView omits newly added wallMask/doorMask fields. Required WM-0021 checks otherwise pass, but this adjacent sim-core regression blocks verification.
